Brotherhood Champion.name: Brotherhood Champion
Brotherhood Champion.equipped_with: A Brotherhood Champion is equipped with: Nemesis force weapon; Storm bolter; Frag grenade; Krak grenade.

weapons.name: Nemesis daemon hammer
weapons.abilities: AT(3), Force weapon, Shield breaker(-1), Slow(-3)

option_groups.header: Can replace the Nemesis force weapon
Only one per army.

abilities: Aegis(5+), Brotherhood of Psykers, Shrouding, They Shall Know No Fear, True Grit

Honor or Death: At the start of the activation, if an enemy HQ or Character is within 12", the placed Order is converted to Charge. The Brotherhood Champion and an attached unit must use the Order to engage in close combat with the enemy HQ or character model.
Martial Superiority: The model may re-roll 1 to hit and 1 to wound roll per activation.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. He knows Smite and 1 power from a chosen discipline.

Captain.name: Captain
Captain.equipped_with: A Captain is equipped with: Nemesis force weapon; Storm bolter; Frag grenade; Krak grenade.

weapons.name: Nemesis daemon hammer
weapons.abilities: AT(3), Force weapon, Shield breaker(-1), Slow(-3)

option_groups.header: Can replace the Nemesis force weapon
Can replace the Storm bolter
Only one Captain or Captain in Nemesis Armor per army.

abilities: Aegis(5+), Brotherhood of Psykers, Deep Strike, Shrouding, They Shall Know No Fear, True Grit, Massive(1), Unyielding

Combat tactics: The Captain can assign two free Veteran abilities to himself and a friendly unit at the start of deployment. Both units must be able to acquire the Veteran ability. It does not count against the limit of how many Veteran abilities a unit can have.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. He knows Smite and 1 power from a chosen discipline.
Terminator armor: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Captain in Nemesis Armor.name: Captain in Nemesis Armor
Captain in Nemesis Armor.equipped_with: A Captain in Nemesis Armor is equipped with: 2 Dreadfists.

option_groups.header: Can swap one Dreadfist
Can be equipped with two of the following
Can be equipped with a Teleporter for +54 points to get the "Jump pack" and "Shunt" abilities and +6" movement.
Only one Captain or Captain in Nemesis Armor per army.

abilities: Aegis(5+), Shrouding, They Shall Know No Fear

Combat tactics: The Captain can assign two free Veteran abilities to himself and a friendly unit at the start of deployment. Both units must be able to acquire the Veteran ability. It does not count against the limit of how many Veteran abilities a unit can have.
Dreadknight force field: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. He knows Smite and 1 power from a chosen discipline.
Shunt: Once per game, the unit may move up to 24" with an Advance order.

Chaplain.name: Chaplain
Chaplain.equipped_with: A Chaplain is equipped with: Crozius Arcanum; Storm bolter; Frag grenade; Krak grenade.

option_groups.header: One Chaplain per army can be upgraded to a Master of Sanctity for +15 points.

abilities: Aegis(5+), Brotherhood of Psykers, Deep Strike, Shrouding, They Shall Know No Fear, True Grit, Massive(1), Unyielding

Faithful: The model can recite 1 prayer per turn. A prayer is successfully recited on a roll of 3+. If a prayer fails to be recited, it can not be attempted again by the same model in this battle round. The model knows all prayers from the Prayer list.
Master of Sanctity: The model can recite 1 additional prayer per turn.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. He knows Smite and 1 power from a chosen discipline.
Rosarius: The model gains a 4+ invulnverability save.

weapons.name: Digital weapons
weapons.abilities: Extra Attack, Hits automatically wound the target

weapons.name: Malleus Argyrum
weapons.abilities: AT(2), Force weapon, Shield breaker(-1), Slow(-2)

weapons.name: Titansword
weapons.abilities: AT(2), Force weapon, Shield breaker(-1), Unique. Only for Captains.

equipment.name: Aquila Imperialis
equipment.desc: Instead of rolling for it, the model and the attached unit can automatically pass a Leadership test once per game. Unique

equipment.name: Astartes bionics
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Warded" ability.

equipment.name: Augurium scrolls
equipment.desc: One melee weapon gains "Life curse".

equipment.name: Bone Shard of a Grand Master
equipment.desc: Once per game, the model may gain a 3+ invulnerability save until the start of its next activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Brotherhood banner
equipment.desc: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Leadership and Combat resolutions. As long as the banner bearer is alive, Mission objectives that are held by this unit can not be contested by enemy units. Additionally, all models in the unit gain +1 Attack. Only for Ancients.

equipment.name: Cuirass of Sacrifice
equipment.desc: All to wound rolls against the model suffer a -1 penalty. Unique.

equipment.name: Deimos masterwork
equipment.desc: One ranged weapon gains "Precision(5+)". Unique.

equipment.name: Domina Liber Daemonica
equipment.desc: The model re-rolls 1s for tests to manifest or deny psychic powers. Unique.

equipment.name: Familiar
equipment.desc: The model may sacrifice the Familiar to reroll a psychic power manifestation test. While it is alive, the model gains +1 Initiative. Only for Librarians.

equipment.name: First to the Fray
equipment.desc: The model must start the game in reserve and will arrive automatically in the first turn (together with its attached unit). They do not count towards the limit of how many units may enter from reserves each round. Must be the first activation of the player. Unique

equipment.name: Grimoire of True Names
equipment.desc: One model in direct base contact suffers -1 penalties to its WS, Initiatives and Attacks, up to a minimum of 1.

equipment.name: Gyrotemporal vault
equipment.desc: If the model successfully manifested a psychic power during its activation, it gains +1 Initiative unti the beginning of its next activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Hexagram warding runes
equipment.desc: Enemy models in direct base contact suffer a -1 penalty to their invulnerability saves.

equipment.name: Inescapable Wrath
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain "Frenzy(2")". Unique.

equipment.name: Iron halo
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Librum Arcana
equipment.desc: The model knows all psychic power from any discipline it would normally have access to. Unique. Only for Librarians.

equipment.name: Mandulian Reliquary
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Objective secured!" ability. Unique.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 to its Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Personal teleporter
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" movement and the "Jump pack" and "Shunt" abilities (See Interceptor Squad). Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Protection balm
equipment.desc: The model gains "Aegis(4+)".

equipment.name: Psy-ammunition
equipment.desc: All ranged weapon of the model gain +1 Strength. Only works on weapons with Strength 4 or below.

equipment.name: Psychic training
equipment.desc: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Purity Seals
equipment.desc: Enemy psykers suffer a -1 to manifestation rolls if they target the model or its attached unit directly.

equipment.name: Radiant Champion
equipment.desc: All melee weapons of the model gain "Soul burn(5+)". Unique. Only for Brotherhood-Champion.

equipment.name: Refractor field
equipment.desc: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Relic helm
equipment.desc: The model can manifest and deny an additional psychic power per turn. Unique.

equipment.name: Sacred weapon
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Selfless healer
equipment.desc: At the end of its movement, the model can attempt to heal a creature within 3". On a 4+, a model regains up to 1 lost Wound. Only for Apothecaries. Unique.

equipment.name: Soul imprint
equipment.desc: One melee weapon gains "Shred". Unique.

equipment.name: Storm shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry".

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 to its Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep Strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: The Emperor's Tarot
equipment.desc: Once per game, the own Initiative roll may be re-rolled. Unique.

equipment.name: The Strands of Fate
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll any one die per activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Truesilver armor
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Retribution(3)" ability.

equipment.name: Warden of the Blade
equipment.desc: Increase the Ld of the model by 1. Additionally, it gains the "Cleansing flame" weapon. Unique. Only for Brotherhood-Champion.

equipment.name: Counter-attack
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Counter-attack".

equipment.name: Favoured enemy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Favoured enemy".

equipment.name: Furious charge
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Furious charge".

equipment.name: Infiltrator
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Infiltrator".

equipment.name: Outflank
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Outflank".

equipment.name: Tank hunter
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Tank hunter".

equipment.name: Terrain expert
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Move through cover" and "Use cover".

equipment.name: Vanguard
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Vanguard".

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Blessed
equipment.desc: The unit has Aegis(4+).

equipment.name: Hunter-killer missile
equipment.desc: The model gains a Hunter-killer missile.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Machine spirit
equipment.desc: If the model is under the effect of "Crew shaken", it may fire one weapon at BS 3+.

equipment.name: Ordained hull
equipment.desc: Enemy units must pass a Leadership test if they want to charge the unit. If they fail the test, another target may be selected.

equipment.name: Psy-ammunition
equipment.desc: All ranged weapon of the model gain +1 Strength. Only works on weapons with Strength 4 or below.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: Truesilver armor
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Retribution(3)" ability.

archetypes.name: Chamber of Purity
archetypes.desc:
- Purifier Squads can be taken as Troops.
- All other Troops become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Hall of Champions
archetypes.desc:
- Paladin Squads can be taken as Troops.
- All other Troops become Elite choices.

legacies.name: Blades of Victory
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Inescapable Pursuit" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Exactors
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Purge Soul" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Prescient Brethren
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Fatal Precognition" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Preservers
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Aegis Eternal" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Rapiers
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Symphonic Strike" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Silver Blades
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Temporal Accuracy" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Swordbearers
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Empyric Lodestone" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Wardmakers
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Projection of Purity" psychic power in addition.

General.name: Smite
General.effect: The target suffers three automatic hits with Strength: 5 AP: -1 D: 1; Seeking.

Sanctity.name: Banishment
Sanctity.effect: All melee attacks of the target gain the (cumulative) Shield breaker(-1) ability.

Sanctity.name: Cleanse Soul
Sanctity.effect: Both the Psyker and the target roll a D6 and add their respective Leadership values. If the Psyker's total is greater than or equal to the target's total, the target model suffers one Mortal Wound.

Sanctity.name: Sanctuary
Sanctity.effect: The target gains the Aegis(4+) and Warded abilities. All terrain within 6 inches is treated as difficult and dangerous for enemy units.

Sanctity.name: Astral Aim
Sanctity.effect: The target gains the Indirect and Seeking abilities for ranged attacks.

Sanctity.name: Destruction
Sanctity.effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with S: 5 AP: -2 D: 1; Barrage, Poison(2+), Seeking.

Dominus.name: Warp Shaping
Dominus.effect: All psychic tests (of all players) receive a bonus OR penalty of 1.

Dominus.name: Empyric Amplification
Dominus.effect: Ranged attacks of the target gain (cumulative) -1 AP and AT(1).

Dominus.name: Ghostly Bonds
Dominus.effect: The target receives one Battleshock marker.

Dominus.name: Gate
Dominus.effect: Remove the unit and place it again via Deep Strike rules. The scatter die is always a hit. Command changes to Move & Shoot and counts as having moved maximum distance.

Dominus.name: Psy-steel Armor
Dominus.effect: The target improves its Saving throw by +2.

Dominus.name: Vortex
Dominus.effect: The target suffers one automatic wound or penetrating hit with S: D AP: -4 D: 3; AT(4), Seeking.

prayers.name: Intonement for Guidance
prayers.effect: The target gains +1 to hit rolls in ranged combat.

prayers.name: Invocation of Focus
prayers.effect: The target and all friendly psykers within 18" range gain a +1 bonus to manifest and deny psychic powers.

prayers.name: Litany of Expulsion
prayers.effect: The target gains +1 to hit rolls in melee combat.

prayers.name: Refrain of Convergence
prayers.effect: The target is immune against Maledictions and Witchfires. Enemy psykers within 18" range automatically suffer a "Perils of the Warp" attack each time they try to manifest a psychic power.

prayers.name: Words of Power
prayers.effect: The target gains the "Armor piercing(5+)" and "Shred" abilities.

prayers.name: Catechism of Fire
prayers.effect: The target gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability for all melee OR ranged weapons.

prayers.name: Focus Recitation
prayers.effect: The target gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

prayers.name: Litany of Hate
prayers.effect: The target gains +1 to hit rolls in ranged OR melee combat.

prayers.name: Mantra of Strength
prayers.effect: The target gains +1 Strength and -1 AP for melee attacks.

Inquisitor.name: Inquisitor
Inquisitor.equipped_with: An Inquisitor is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: An Inquisitor cannot be the mandatory choice for the HQ slot.
Can be upgraded to a psyker for +5 points.
One Inquisitor per army can be upgraded to an Inquisitor Lord for +10 points.

abilities: Command squad
Psyker: A psyker can cast 1 psychic power and dispel 1 psychic power per round. A psyker knows Smite, as well as one psychic power from a chosen psychic discipline.

Inquisitorial requisiton: The Inquisitor got additional access to a single weapon or wargear item from any Imperial faction. Requirements like specific traits or "Only for xy" must still be met. Wargear that got the same description or ability like an item from their own armory can't be taken.
Inquisitor Lord: The Inquisitor Lord may purchase one additional item from any Imperial faction.

Arbites.name: Arbites
Arbites.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Arbites combat shotgun; Arbites shotpistol; Frag grenade; Krak grenade.

option_groups.header: Two Arbitrators may swap their Arbites combat shotguns
Any remaining models may swap their Arbites combat shotguns

abilities: Arbites shield: The model gains "Deflect" and "Parry".

Monofilament: If the target enemy unit is in cover and at least one hit has been scored with the weapon, the terrain counts as difficult and dangerous terrain until the end of the next activation of the target unit.

Ordo Hereticus Warband.name: Ordo Hereticus Warband

option_groups.header: Only for armies with an Ordo Hereticus Inquisitor.
A warband consists of a maximum of 12 models. Each army can only contain a single warband.
Each Missionary can be equipped with an Eviscerator for +5 points.
Each Servitor can be equipped with one of the following weapons
The unit may get one of these abilities (points per model, including an attached Inquisitor)

abilities: Arco-flagellant: Every Arco-flagellant has the "Berserker(5+)" and "Blind rage" special ability.
Bodyguard: Every Acolyte has the "Bodyguard" special ability.
Devout: A Missionary can recite 1 hymn per turn. A hymn is successfully recited on a roll of 3+. A missionary knows a prayer from the hymns of battle.

Narthecium: Once per turn, the damage of a wound against the model or attached unit can be reduced by 1. The ability must be declared after armor and invulnerability saves. Does not work against weapons with a strength of 8 or above.
Pariah: While a Penitent is alive, the unit gains the "Aegis(4+)" special ability.
Servitor: As long as the Inquisitor is alive, Servitors get +1 to hit rolls.
Wise Guidance: While a Sage is alive in the unit, all weapons in the unit gain Deflagration(5+).

Ordo Malleus Warband.name: Ordo Malleus Warband

option_groups.header: Only for armies with an Ordo Malleus Inquisitor.
A warband consists of a maximum of 12 models. Each army can only contain a single warband.
Each Excorcist can be equipped with an Eviscerator for +5 points.
Each Servitor can be equipped with one of the following weapons
The unit may get one of these abilities (points per model, including an attached Inquisitor)

abilities: Infantry
Aura of Faith: While an Exorcist is alive in the unit, all models gain a 5+ invulnerability save against melee weapons.
Bodyguard: Every Acolyte has the "Bodyguard" special ability.
Jokaero Digital Weapons: All Jokaero in the squad can fire the same weapon each round: Heavy flamer, Lascannon, Multi-melta. All weapons fired by a Jokaero have the "Assault" type.
Psionic Flare: A friendly unit arriving via deep strike does not scatter when set up within 6" of the Mystic. Increase the range by 6" for each additional Mystic.
Psyker: A Psyker can cast 1 psychic power and dispel 1 psychic power per round. A Psyker knows Smite, as well as one psychic power from a chosen psychic discipline.
Servitor: As long as the Inquisitor is alive, Servitors get +1 to hit rolls.
Warp shield: While the Daemonhost is alive in the unit, all models gain a 5+ invulnerability save against ranged weapons.

Ordo Xenos Warband.name: Ordo Xenos Warband

option_groups.header: Only for armies with an Ordo Xenos Inquisitor.
A warband consists of a maximum of 12 models. Each army can only contain a single warband.
Each Servitor can be equipped with one of the following weapons
The unit may get one of these abilities (points per model, including an attached Inquisitor)

abilities: Archaeotech Enhancement: While an Archaeotech Researcher is alive in the unit, all weapons in the unit gain Armor piercing(5+).
Bodyguard: Every Acolyte has the "Bodyguard" special ability.
Know Your Enemy: As long as a Xenologist is alive in the unit, it gains the "Favoured enemy" special rule against all Xeno factions.
Leadership: As long as an Alien World Scout is alive in the unit, it gains the "Use Cover" and "Move Through Cover" special rule.
Psyker: A Psyker can cast 1 psychic power and dispel 1 psychic power per round. A Psyker knows Smite, as well as one psychic power from a chosen psychic discipline.
Servitor: As long as the Inquisitor is alive, Servitors get +1 to hit rolls.

Stormtroopers.name: Stormtroopers
Stormtroopers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Frag grenade; Hot-shot lasgun; Krak grenade.

option_groups.header: For every 5 models, two Stormtroopers may swap their Hot-shot lasguns
The unit may get one of these abilities (points per model)

abilities: Sniper: Models equipped with a Sniper rifle get a +1 bonus to their BS.

Deathcult Assassins.name: Deathcult Assassins
Deathcult Assassins.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Power sword.
abilities: Deflect, Infiltrator, Parry
Lightning reflexes: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

Land Raider Prometheus.name: Land Raider Prometheus
Land Raider Prometheus.equipped_with: A Land Raider is a single model and equipped with: 2 Quad heavy bolters.

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with
Can be equipped with an additional Storm bolter for +11 points.

abilities: Assault ramp: Passengers can still make a 6" charge move after the vehicle moves and they exit.
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 infantry models.

Corvus Blackstar.name: Corvus Blackstar
Corvus Blackstar.equipped_with: A Corvus Blackstar is equipped with: Twin assault cannon; Twin Blackstar rocket launcher.

option_groups.header: Can replace the Twin assault cannon
Can replace the Twin Blackstar rocket launcher
Can be equipped with one Hurricane bolt gun for +32 points.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fast, Hover mode
Infernum halo-launcher: Enemy weapons do not get any bonus for "Anti-Air" abilities.
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 infantry models. Cannot transport models with the "Massive" ability.

Chimera.name: Chimera
Chimera.equipped_with: A Chimera is a single model and equipped with: Two Heavy flamers; Two lasgun arrays.

option_groups.header: Can replace the Heavy flamer
Can replace the Heavy flamer

abilities: Fire hatches(2)
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 infantry models.

Rhino.name: Rhino
Rhino.equipped_with: A Rhino is a single model and equipped with: Storm bolter.

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with an additional Storm bolter for +11 points.

abilities: Fire hatches(2)
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 infantry models, excluding models in Terminator armor.

Taurox.name: Taurox
Taurox.equipped_with: A Taurox is a single model and equipped with: 2 Hot-shot volley guns.

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with one of the following
Can replace both Hot-shot volley guns
May be equipped with one of the following weapons

abilities: Fire hatches(2)
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 infantry models.

Valkyrie.name: Valkyrie
Valkyrie.equipped_with: A Valkyrie is equipped with: Multilaser.

option_groups.header: Can replace the Multi-laser
Can be equipped with one of the following
Can be equipped with two Heavy bolters for +36 points.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fast, Hover mode
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 infantry models.
